# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused on one concern.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run package` if this changes extension packaging, runners, commands, settings, or Marketplace-facing content.
- [ ] I manually verified affected UI, queue, runner, permission, or worktree behavior when relevant.
- [ ] I updated `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or support/security docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, generated VSIX files, local task artifacts, private prompts, or machine-specific paths.

## Manual QA

List what you tested, or explain why manual QA is not needed.

## Risk

Call out any remaining risks, follow-up work, or behavior that reviewers should inspect closely.
